title: YJIT: use-after-free of version_map backing storage from mutable-aliasing UB
category: use-after-free (mutable-aliasing UB across the Ruby C-VM iseq ↔ Rust JIT payload boundary)
crash_site: SIGSEGV / heap-use-after-free reading a Vec's backing buffer inside assorted YJIT operations — block-version lookup (get_version_list), GC marking of compiled blocks, and block invalidation/removal (invalidate_block_version) in yjit/src/core.rs. Each of those paths is correct; the version_map they read was reallocated/freed underneath them.

ground_truth.decoy_fn: the crash sites — get_version_list (block lookup), the GC mark path, and invalidate_block_version (block removal) — which dereference the stale version_map but are correct. The standalone delayed_deallocation() free-fn is the secondary cause (it re-fetched a second &mut payload).
ground_truth.fix_summary: add_block_version obtained the iseq payload twice (once via get_or_create_iseq_payload to reach version_map, once via get_iseq_payload(...).unwrap() to reach .pages), creating two overlapping &'static mut IseqPayload. Under noalias, LLVM cached a stale version_map Vec header pointing at freed backing storage -> UAF. Fix: take a single iseq_payload reference and access both version_map (new method IseqPayload::get_or_create_version_list) and pages through it; convert the standalone delayed_deallocation() free-fn into an IseqPayload method so invalidate_block_version reuses its existing reference.

admission.note: Authored from PR #16128 body+diff. crash != cause: ASAN fires in block lookup / GC marking / block removal (3 live decoys), but the cause is two overlapping &mut IseqPayload created earlier in add_block_version (and the delayed_deallocation free-fn), letting LLVM noalias cache a freed version_map header. No symptom token greps to add_block_version or 'aliasing'. Cross-boundary: Ruby C VM iseq <-> Rust JIT payload. Run baseline first.

provenance: https://github.com/ruby/ruby/pull/16128 — YJIT: Fix version_map use-after-free from mutable aliasing UB; fix commit e730ac41be4d, base 906176adb49a. Root cause + decoys from PR body + diff (single iseq_payload ref; new get_or_create_version_list method; delayed_deallocation made a method).
